items.key: (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

items.key: (@@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

command.text: declare @ho_ten nvarchar(256), @ma_nv varchar(32), @department nvarchar(512) select @ma_nv = rtrim(ma_nv), @ho_ten = rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + ten_nv from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @department = ten_bp%l from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp select @ma_nv as ma_nv, @ho_ten as ho_ten, isnull(@department, '') as ten_bp%l return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$overlapped nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi này đã tồn tại trong điều chỉnh dữ liệu lương.' else N'This record is already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Bản ghi này đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This record has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$overlapped = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Phạm vi hiệu lực không được giao hoặc trùng nhau.' else N'The effective range must not be overlapped or duplicated.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where &k1;) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$exists as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where &k2;) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if not (&k0;) begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where not (&k2;) and (&k1;)) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$exists as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where &k1;

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin select stt_rec from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv return end
